problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Self-assembled. Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
